parsed.title: Procurement Notices - UNDP-TJK-00627 - 131-2026-RFQ-UNDP-GF “Supply of food kits
parsed.text: Procurement Notices - UNDP-TJK-00627 - 131-2026-RFQ-UNDP-GF “Supply of food kits GLOBAL Procurement Notices About Us Procurement at UNDP UNDP Office of Procurement Our Guiding Principles UNDP Procurement Strategy & Sustainable Procurement Procurement Training & Certification For Suppliers How we buy What we buy Qualifications and eligibility Protest and sanctions Supplier code of conduct Quantum eTendering guidance Annual procurement statistics Resources for suppliers FAQ Contract Awards Search Notices Nav toggle About Us For Suppliers Contract Awards Search Notices Back About Us Procurement at UNDP UNDP Office of Procurement Our Guiding Principles UNDP Procurement Strategy & Sustainable Procurement Procurement Training & Certification For Suppliers Page Title How we buy What we buy Qualifications and eligibility Protest and sanctions Supplier code of conduct Quantum eTendering guidance Annual procurement statistics Resources for suppliers FAQ Back Select Language English FranÃ§ais EspaÃ±ol Home 131-2026-RFQ-UNDP-GF “Supply of food kits 131-2026-RFQ-UNDP-GF “Supply of food kits Procurement Process RFQ - Request for quotation Office UNDP-TJK - TAJIKISTAN Deadline 13-Jul-26 @ 05:00 AM (New York time) Published on 25-Jun-26 @ 12:00 AM (New York time) Reference Number UNDP-TJK-00627 Contact Procurement Unit - procurement.tj@undp.org This specific tender is managed via the new supplier portal system of UNDP Quantum. If you are interested in submitting a bid for this tender, you must subscribe following the instructions in the user guide . If you have not registered a profile with this system, you can do so by following the link for Supplier Registration . If you already have a supplier profile, please access the negotiation using quicklink or please login to the Supplier Portal , then search for the negotiation using the reference number UNDP-TJK-00627 , following the instructions in the user guide . Introduction Case ref. No 131-2026-RFQ-UNDP-GF “Supply of food kits Interested suppliers must submit their offer directly in the system as instructed in the solicitation document, following the instructions in the available user guide. In case you have never registered before, you can register a profile using the registration link shared via the procurement notice and following the instructions in guides available in the UNDP website: https://www.undp.org/procurement/business/resources-for-bidders . Do not create a new profile if you already have one. Use the forgotten password feature in case you do not remember the password or the username from previous registration. Search for the specific tender using search filters and subscribe to the tender in order to get notifications in case of amendments of the tender document. If you need support with the online system, you can contact the contact details of this tender as indicated in the solicitation document. This RFQ provides for engagement of the local/national companies due to the mandatory national certification requirements!
